for_c_level: This run exposes high risk in our testing harness reliability, rendering the campaign unusable for assessing production readiness. No progress on agent memory sharing viability for customer claims; prior runs' results remain unchanged. Immediate triage needed to avoid blocking release candidate validation.
for_non_technical: This test run didn't work at all because no results were collected from any planned checks. That means we couldn't see if agents can reliably share memories with each other. It's like planning a big experiment but forgetting to turn on the recording equipment.
for_sme: The campaign aborted without executing any of the 44 requested scenarios (e.g., S1, S1b, S2, etc.), likely due to a harness failure in report recovery as per the 'no scenario reports recovered' reason. No primitives were impacted or tested; probable root cause is CI workflow or infra provisioning issues (harness_sha: 0bf771be6c7410ac2757744b14bbe9280b7105c8). No specific testbook/probe identifiers available since scenarios array is empty.
headline: Campaign failed with no scenario reports recovered.
next_run_change: Debug and fix report recovery mechanism in the CI harness before re-running the campaign.
verdict: FAIL — zero scenarios executed or reported.
what_it_proved: The run demonstrated a critical harness or infrastructure failure preventing any scenario execution or report collection.
what_it_tested: No scenarios were exercised due to failure in recovering reports, covering zero axes of transport, framework, or primitives.
